name: Gami Cap sfrxUSD Vault
description: The Gami Vault delegating sfrxUSD to the Gami operator for Cap. The sfrxUSD Vault enables users to earn yield on sfrxUSD, where deposits are allocated across Curve liquidity provisioning via StakeDAO, Spectra yield trading, Morpho leveraged loops (up to 5×), and the gamiUSDC strategy.
